descriptionShort: Box score and summary of Centennial Cup West semifinal game between Richmond and Red Deer on April 7, 1987.
descriptionLong: Game summary and box score for the Centennial Cup West semifinal between the Richmond Sockeyes and Red Deer Advocates on Tuesday, April 7, 1987. Red Deer defeated Richmond 7-5 in overtime, with Ward scoring the overtime winner at 0:59. The series standings show Red Deer leading the best-of-seven 3-2, with Game 6 scheduled for that evening at 7:30 p.m.
